Q_0(t) = 1
Q_1(t) = t - \frac{1}{4}
Q_2(t) = t^{2} - \frac{16}{27}t + \frac{1}{27}
Q_3(t) = t^{3} - \frac{4779}{4600}t^{2} + \frac{1107}{4600}t - \frac{133}{18400}
Q_4(t) = t^{4} - \frac{12928}{8883}t^{3} + \frac{25104}{41125}t^{2} - \frac{592}{8225}t + \frac{179}{158625}
Q_5(t) = t^{5} - \frac{88959375}{46704448}t^{4} + \frac{1158533750}{965468511}t^{3} - \frac{40569875}{143032372}t^{2} + \frac{2935095}{143032372}t - \frac{1775657}{8827140672}
Q_6(t) = t^{6} - \frac{120523344}{51630251}t^{5} + \frac{12910529375}{6608672128}t^{4} - \frac{338272966250}{478147754511}t^{3} + \frac{126598125}{1200622108}t^{2} - \frac{87736688}{17709176093}t + \frac{1913585797}{61202912577408}
Q_7(t) = t^{7} - \frac{48326872919533313}{17362696060475700}t^{6} + \frac{21244289912493291}{7234456691864875}t^{5} - \frac{73225151183954875}{50004564654170016}t^{4} + \frac{13146791630605885}{37503423490627512}t^{3} - \frac{67022514184871}{1852020913117408}t^{2} + \frac{374639973023071}{312528529088562600}t - \frac{399527598005603}{75006846981255024000}
Q_8(t) = t^{8} - \frac{26551865879862784}{8250981261845247}t^{7} + \frac{11224313961207424}{2750327087281749}t^{6} - \frac{131740553706455131648}{50842852127388998875}t^{5} + \frac{256409321443024270640}{296515513606932641439}t^{4} - \frac{1308764599075560256}{8985318594149473983}t^{3} + \frac{118821965158866928}{10982056059516023757}t^{2} - \frac{76776869677337408}{296515513606932641439}t + \frac{10162622056138099}{12354813066955526726625}
